content:
<@264950223376351233>The staff responsible for developing the text reading function told me that they have never created a feature to skip plot dialogues using keyboard keys🥺

thread_title: 💭「Processing」The Spacebar/Enter key on Steam PC version not working

content:
To be clear and concise, when I am playing the game on PC, you see the icon on the top right on this screenshot, yes? I circled it. 
If I want to finish the dialogue manually, I can click with my mouse, or use Enter/Spacebar key to complete the dialogue and go forward to the next. However, since the anniversary update, I can only do it with a mouse now.

I and others have confirmed this, we can ask people to come into this channel to confirm. I believe I wasn't clear on the issue before, so I hope this is a more concise summation of the issue.

In order for me to personally give you a video proof, I would have to downgrade the game. Morimens have no public beta for older versions on Steam PC.

I need you to carefully check with the dev team again because the playerbase on Steam PC like myself have had this ability before. If not, please give us access to an older version
thread_title: 💭「Processing」The Spacebar/Enter key on Steam PC version not working

content:
Context:
In light of the crit rate bug in Sunfall, I wonder if any other crit sources might have issues?

Issue:
It is quite hard to view and test since there are many wheels (e.g. Lily's wheel) and covs (e.g. Paradox ) that only give crit to command cards or just a subset of them.

Question:
Would it be possible to display final crit rates per command card? (and even the final dmg including crit dmg if possible) 

Suggestions:
At a minimum, just a crit rate % next to the dmg amount shouldn't add to the text clutter too much? e.g. instead of "Deal X DMG", it could say "Deal X DMG, with Y% Crit rate"; or even better, "Deal X DMG, crit for Z DMG at Y%"

(probably a separate discussion on how to improve/toggle detailed text per card)

In addition, exalts and tentacle crit rates could be more visible too, might also just an extra number next to their dmg which are already shown in UI.
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Display crit rate (and maybe final dmg if crit) per card?

content: It would add to the clutter, but a way to check for this thing could be usefull
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Display crit rate (and maybe final dmg if crit) per card?

content: a togglable option to "show more info" could be the best
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Display crit rate (and maybe final dmg if crit) per card?

content: but it will need some work to be implemented
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Display crit rate (and maybe final dmg if crit) per card?

content: agreed, but given how important crit is to many units at end game, i think it should be designed and implemented somehow
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Display crit rate (and maybe final dmg if crit) per card?

content: i've had quite a few missed crits with Kath at 90%+ crit rate, and right now have low confidence whether i was just very unlucky or maybe, paradox doesn't even work like Sunfall
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Display crit rate (and maybe final dmg if crit) per card?

content: better visibility would at the very least improve player confidence on this
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Display crit rate (and maybe final dmg if crit) per card?

content: now whenever we miss a crit, we can just say it's the game's fault
thread_title: ✅「Answered」Display crit rate (and maybe final dmg if crit) per card?
✅「Answered」Display crit rate (and maybe final dmg if crit) per card?

content:
I really like radios dramas, but took me a long while to realise they were there! being buried quite a few layers into the archives, and I wonder if many other players don't even know they exist like me.

It would be nice to make them more obvious, especially when new ones are released; perhaps Event tag is a good place to prompt and link players to them?
